productDisplayName: Peter England Unisex Black Messanger Bag
description: Style Notepeter england presents a wide range of efficient, everyday travel gear combined with impressive style. This messanger bag from Peter England, specifically designed for work and weekend trips, strikes the right balance between convenience and style. The various compartments are a smart, neat and compact way to carry all your essentials and is on the  top of our wishlist!Product DetailsOne main zipped compartment with a small netbook compartment that has a velcro closureOne insert pocket and one pocket with a velcro closureTwo short handles for carrying at easeTwo small zipped pockets on the front, one with an organiser sleeveOne zipped pocket at the back for enhanced spaceOne long, removable and adjustable handleBranding on the frontMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustWarranty: 6 monthsSizeHeight: 37 cmWidth: 27 cmDepth: 10 cm
